notes: Independent test describes KS3000 as 300W LED bar light for 3x3 coverage; some retailer sources list 320W, so revision/source conflict. | [Recherche 2026-06-27] ASIN B09XDS9S8G verifiziert (Titel: VIPARSPECTRA KS3000 LED Grow Light Samsung LM301H & Osram Diodes, 300W, 90x90cm Cover, Full Spectrum Dimmable); Technik ergaenzt: ppf_umol_s,efficacy_umol_j,ppfd_umol_m2_s,ppfd_distance_cm | CocoForCannabis test (usable ePAR): ePPF 731.1 umol/s, 2.45 umol/J, avg PPFD 902.6 at 21.5cm, 90x90. amazon.de KS3000 320W LM301H listing matches.
uvp_notes: Official US collection lists USED KS3000 regular price 319.99 USD, sale 189.99 USD.
